The '''Armored Personnel Carrier (APC)''' was an armored, land-based [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] [[Soldier/Legends|troop]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]] vehicle used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:ArmoredPersonelCarrierRS02.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Another view of an Imperial APC.]]
The Armored Personnel Carrier was a [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] [[Soldier/Legends|troop]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]] was armed with two double [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannons]], and one mounted [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-Web heavy repeating blaster]]. The two blaster cannons were positioned in turrets equipped with spotlights flanking the main door, while the E-Web was mounted on top. The APC also included holding cells for [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]].

==History==
[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] [[Mission to Dantooine|encountered]] several Armored Personnel Carriers on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] and [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], where they were used to deploy troops, serve as medium attack vehicles, and transport the Imperial defector [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]].

During his encounters, he discovered that they had weak hulls around the double blaster cannons and was, for the most part, able to disable them with fire from E-Web blasters.

APCs were later dispatched to the Empire's [[Defense of Ralltiir|invasion and subsequent blockade of]] [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]]. Rebel pilot [[Sarkli]], when defecting to the Empire during the Alliance's attempt at evacuating the scientists, boarded an APC.

{{Veh-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:ArmoredPersonelCarrierRS03.jpg|thumb|right|220px|Concept art for the APC.]]
These APCs appear in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' {{1st}}
